{"id":"project-LICHEN-g681","title":"TransitInformation parsing ignores E flag","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/dao.py:74-84

The TransitInformation.from_option() always requires a 20-byte payload (4 header bytes + 16-byte parent address), but RFC 6550 Section 6.7.8 makes the parent address conditional on the E flag.

RFC 6550 states:
> If the E flag is set, then a Parent Address field MUST be present.

Current code:
```python
if len(opt.data) < 4 + 16:
    raise DaoError("Transit Information option missing parent address")
```

This will:
1. Reject valid Transit Information options with E=0 (no parent address)
2. Not check the E flag at opt.data[0] & 0x80

While LICHEN may only generate E=1 DAOs, interoperability with other RPL implementations could be affected if they send E=0 Transit Information options.

Fix: Check the E flag at opt.data[0] bit 7, and only require/parse parent address if E=1.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:13.670238Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:13.670267Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-g681","title":"TransitInformation parsing ignores E flag","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/dao.py:74-84

The TransitInformation.from_option() always requires a 20-byte payload (4 header bytes + 16-byte parent address), but RFC 6550 Section 6.7.8 makes the parent address conditional on the E flag.

RFC 6550 states:
> If the E flag is set, then a Parent Address field MUST be present.

Current code:
```python
if len(opt.data) < 4 + 16:
    raise DaoError("Transit Information option missing parent address")
```

This will:
1. Reject valid Transit Information options with E=0 (no parent address)
2. Not check the E flag at opt.data[0] & 0x80

While LICHEN may only generate E=1 DAOs, interoperability with other RPL implementations could be affected if they send E=0 Transit Information options.

Fix: Check the E flag at opt.data[0] bit 7, and only require/parse parent address if E=1.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:13.670238Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:43.068033139Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:43.068033139Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:25:43.068033139Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:43.068033139Z"}

new_value: E flag check + conditional parent parsing already in from_option (per RFC). Removed comment per no-comments rule. ruff passes. Commit 0501a91f9.
